title: QUT BMW Technology Partnership Program
summary: An overview of the partnership between QUT and BMW Group for technology internships.
body:
The QUT BMW Technology Partnership Program connects Queensland University of Technology students with BMW Group's cutting-edge technology teams. This program offers hands-on experience in areas such as autonomous driving, software engineering, data science, and electric vehicle technology.

BMW Group is committed to fostering the next generation of technology leaders, and this partnership with QUT reflects that dedication.
